flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Wisconsin-Superior fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Superior fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Wisconsin-Superior rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (64.7% → 71.8%).
